name: create_cron_job
description: Create a scheduled task (cron job) that runs a prompt on a schedule. Use when the user wants recurring reminders, checks, or automated tasks.

name.description: A short, descriptive name for this task (e.g., 'Morning Server Check')

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction that will be sent to the AI when the job fires

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g., '0 7 * * *' for daily at 7 AM, '*/30 * * * *' for every 30 minutes)

frequency_hint.description: Human-readable description of the schedule (e.g., 'Every day at 7 AM')

model.description: Which AI model should execute this job. Use 'computer-use' for tasks needing desktop/browser/GUI interaction (default: gemini)

delivery.description: How to deliver the result (default: snapshot)

delivery_target.description: Phone number for SMS/voice delivery (E.164 format), not needed for snapshot/notification

one_shot.description: If true, run once and auto-delete (for one-time reminders). Default: false
